hero.subtext: Registered massage and manual osteopathic therapy tailored to your body's unique needs — treating the root cause, not just the symptoms.

about.bio: I'm a Registered Massage Therapist and Manual Osteopathic Therapist based in Saskatoon, SK. My approach goes beyond surface-level relief — I specialize in therapeutic treatment that works with all systems of the body to find the root cause of your pain or dysfunction. Whether you're dealing with chronic tension, injury recovery, postural issues, or stress, I'm here to create a personalized treatment plan. Every session is in a clean, relaxing, and welcoming environment.
about.credentials: Registered Massage Therapist (RMT) · Manual Osteopathic Therapist
about.location: Integrative Therapies Health Collective, 1647 29th St W, Saskatoon, SK

bookingCta.heading: Book Your Session
bookingCta.subtext: Online booking is fast and easy through Jane App. Prefer to reach out first? Text us for the fastest response.
